intro: The finance sector was a primary target in a series of high-severity incidents detailed in this archive. Between April 13 and April 18, 2026, five reports documented methods for bypassing multi-factor authentication. The threat actors Storm-2755 and Tycoon 2FA were active, with additional campaigns impacting human resources, payroll, and multiple other sectors. While activity was noted globally, Canada was a specifically affected region. All five incidents in this period were assessed as high severity, highlighting the critical risk these techniques pose to organizational security.
